items.title: Undefined behavior, tests and sanitizers: reject the invalid rule
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this C misconception? If sanitizer tests pass, the C program contains no undefined behavior on any input.
hints: Compare each option with the exact language rule, standard boundary, and observable evidence in the authored draft.

feedback.correct: Correct. Sanitizer success is path-limited evidence; combine it with contracts, bounds and lifetime reasoning, diagnostics, and broader tests.
feedback.incorrect: That option preserves the documented misconception. Sanitizer success is path-limited evidence; combine it with contracts, bounds and lifetime reasoning, diagnostics, and broader tests.

criteria.description: Selects the source-aligned C correction instead of the documented misconception.
